use_cases: Displaying contextual help text and additional information on hover for UI elements
Showing keyboard shortcuts and feature explanations in interface controls
Providing labels and descriptions for icon-only buttons in compact UI layouts
Revealing additional context for form fields and data table entries
Guiding users through complex interfaces with progressive disclosure patterns
ai_summary: A lightweight, animated tooltip component built on Radix UI primitives for displaying contextual information on hover. Features smooth enter/exit animations with directional slide-in effects and includes a styled arrow indicator. Designed as an atomic component for integration into any React application requiring accessible hover-reveal functionality.
